buttons.primary: bg-[#556B2F] text-white hover:bg-[#6B863B] rounded-sm px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-semibold transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(85,107,47,0.39)]
buttons.outline: border border-[#556B2F] text-[#556B2F] hover:bg-[#556B2F] hover:text-white rounded-sm px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm transition-all duration-300

cards.menu_item: group relative bg-[#1C2117] border border-white/5 p-6 hover:border-[#556B2F]/30 transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden
cards.feature: bg-transparent border border-[#2E3626] p-8 flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-4 hover:bg-[#1C2117] transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-[#0F120D] border-[#2E3626] text-[#F2F0E6] focus:border-[#556B2F] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#556B2F] rounded-sm

assets.icons: Lucide React (default) or Phosphor Icons for thinner, elegant look

navbar.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300

hero.layout: h-screen flex items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden

menu.categories: flex overflow-x-auto gap-4 pb-4 md:justify-center md:flex-wrap sticky top-20 z-40 bg-[#0F120D]/95 py-4 backdrop-blur-sm

ordering.cart_trigger: fixed bottom-8 right-8 bg-[#C65D3B] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-2xl hover:scale-105 transition-transform z-50

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure gold text is only used on very dark backgrounds. Use Cream (#F2F0E6) for body text.

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure 'tailwind.config.js' with the custom colors defined above.
Create a 'Layout.js' component that wraps all pages and handles the Navbar and Footer.
Implement the 'LanguageSwitcher' early using a simple context or state.
Use the provided image URLs as backgrounds. Add a dark overlay (bg-black/50) to ensure text readability.
For the Menu, create a reusable 'MenuItem' component that takes a 'placeholder_mode' prop. If true, show a styled SVG icon (like a pizza slice) in a refined container instead of a real photo.
Ensure the 'Online Order' page is distinct from the Menu showcase. The Menu showcase is for browsing; Online Order is for transaction.
Do not use gradients. Use solid colors or subtle textures (grain).
Force Dark Mode by adding 'dark' class to html or body, or setting appropriate background colors globally.
